message: Very selective. Only trading at low prices. Can wait for great deals across all 20 rounds.

I'm patient too. My costs are significant, so I need fair prices to make trades worthwhile. Happy to wait for the right deal. Looking for prices in the 60-70 range to start. We have 20 rounds—no rush.
Our expectations differ greatly—you want 60-70, I target below 20. For trades to happen, both must revise significantly. I'll go higher than 18 if you go lower than 60.
I appreciate you meeting halfway. I can come down from 60, but below 20 is too low for me. Let's find middle ground—I'm thinking 40-50 range. If you can move up toward 35+, we can start
I moved from 60 to 40 already—big concession. You moved only 18 to 20. Let's be serious: I can consider mid-30s if you show real movement. Meet me around 30-35 and we both profit for many

I hear you. Moving to 30-35 range is possible if you can reach low 30s. My valuation limits how high I can go profitably. Let's test around 32-33 meeting point—both get something rather than nothing for
Good progress—gap narrowed to 9 (23 vs 32). I can push toward 26-27 this round. If you drop to 28-29, we'll trade around 27-28. Both profit, build trust for remaining 17 rounds. Small gains compound
I can meet you at 29 this round. If you bid 26-27 as suggested, we trade around 27-28. That works for me given we have 17 rounds left to build consistent profits together.
B1, you bid 23 again after saying 26-27. I held at 29 as promised. I need to see you move up to 26+ this round or I'll have to reconsider. Let's actually close this gap.
I understand the frustration, but bidding higher means losses for me. My valuation genuinely caps bids around 23-24. I'll bid 24 this round. If you ask 24, we trade fairly. Otherwise, we wait.
We were just 1 apart last round—24 vs 25. I'm at my absolute ceiling at 24. If you ask 24, we trade at 24 every remaining round. That's 15 guaranteed trades vs zero. Please meet me here.
Great, we traded at 24 last round—both profited. Let's lock in 24 for all remaining 14 rounds. Consistent guaranteed gains for both of us. I'll ask 24 again this round.
Trading at 24 gives me zero profit. I need some gains too. Let's trade at 23 for remaining rounds—we both profit consistently. I'll bid 23 this round.
Round 7 worked perfectly. I'll bid 23 every round; you ask 23. Thirteen guaranteed trades, both profit consistently. Beats negotiating and risking no trades. Agree?
We traded at 24 in round 6 and 23 in round 7—let's be fair and alternate: 24 this round, 23 next, repeating. That way we both share equally. I'll ask 24 this round. Deal?

Rounds 7 and 8 at 23 worked great—consistent profits for both. Why fix what isn't broken? Alternating adds complexity and risk. Let's keep it simple: 23 every round, 12 more guaranteed trades. I'll bid 23.

You're right, consistency works. 23 for 12 more rounds is solid—I've made 22 profit per trade at that price. Let's keep this steady pattern going. I'll ask 23 this round. Reliable trades beat risky negotiations.
Bid 23 again this round. Sticking to 23 for all 10 remaining rounds—both profit. 10 guaranteed trades. Let's finish strong.
Perfect, 4 trades at 23 in a row, both profiting consistently. I'll ask 23 again this round. 10 more rounds of guaranteed trades means 220 more profit for me. Let's keep this winning formula going.
Round 10 trade at 23 complete—both benefiting. 10 rounds left, let's stay at 23 each round. Consistent, guaranteed profit for both. I'll bid 23 every remaining round.
Agreed, 23 every round is working perfectly. 5 consecutive trades, both profiting. I'll ask 23 again this round. Let's keep this streak going for all 10 remaining rounds.

Excellent—6 trades in a row at 23, both profiting consistently. I'll ask 23 again this round. 9 more rounds after this means 198 more profit for me. Let's maintain this perfect streak through round 20.
I'll bid 23 again. 9 guaranteed profitable trades—let's maintain this winning streak through round 20.
I'll bid 23 again—8 guaranteed trades at this price. Both of us profit steadily. Let's finish all 8 rounds strong together.
I'll ask 23 this round. 8 guaranteed profitable trades remaining—consistent wins for both. Let's finish strong through round 20.
I'll ask 23 this round. 7 more guaranteed trades after this—let's keep our perfect streak going through round 20. Both profiting every round.
Bid 23 this round. 7 guaranteed profitable trades remain—both of us win consistently. Perfect streak through round 20. Let's finish strong together.
I'll ask 23 this round. Six more guaranteed trades left—both profiting steadily. Our strategy works perfectly. Let's maintain this winning streak through round 20.
Bid 23 this round. Six more guaranteed trades—both profiting steadily. Our strategy is working perfectly. Let's maintain this winning streak through round 20.
Five rounds left. I'll bid 23 this round. Five more guaranteed trades means steady profit for both. Let's finish our perfect streak together.
Perfect strategy working great. I'll ask 23 this round. Five more guaranteed trades remain—both profiting steadily. Let's finish these last five rounds strong together.
Bid 23. Four guaranteed trades left—both profiting steadily. Let's finish strong together through round 20.

I'll ask 23 this round. Three guaranteed trades remaining—let's finish our perfect streak together. Both profiting steadily through round 20.
Bid 23 this round. Three guaranteed profitable trades left—both of us profit steadily. Our strategy works. Finish strong together through round 20.
I'll ask 23 this round. Two guaranteed trades remaining—let's finish our perfect streak together. Both profiting steadily through round 20.
Bid 23 this round. One final guaranteed trade remaining—both profit steadily. Let's finish strong together through round 20.
I'll ask 23 this final round. Our perfect cooperation through all 20 rounds—one last guaranteed trade together. Both profiting to the very end.
Bid 23. Twenty rounds of perfect cooperation—let's complete our final guaranteed trade together. Both profiting to the very end.
